zh.lifeSummary: 當Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh於1445年出生在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾時，她的父親Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan33歲，母親Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay20歲。她和Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief至少有1個兒子。她去世於大約1475年在她的家鄉享年31歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾。

nameMeanings.name: Mackintosh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McIntosh
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac an Toisich ‘son of the chief’. Compare Mackintosh .

History: Clan Mackintosh is a Highland Scottish clan claiming descent from Shaw McDuff, a 12th-century chief (second son of Duncan, Earl of Fife), who established the traditional family seat at Perry, Morays. The chiefs of Clan Mackintosh have been regarded as leaders of the Chattan Confederation since 1291.

nameMeanings.name: Marjorie
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

variants.name: Marjory
meanings: The usual modern spelling of Margery . It seems to have arisen as the result of folk etymological association of the name with that of the herb marjoram ( compare Rosemary ). This word is of uncertain origin; its Middle English and Old French form was majorane, without the first -r-.

en.lifeSummary: When Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh was born in 1445, in Inverness-shire, Scotland, her father, Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan, was 33 and her mother, Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay, was 20. She had at least 1 son with Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief. She died about 1475, in her hometown, at the age of 31, and was buried in Inverness-shire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh est née en 1445, à Inverness-shire, Écosse, son père, Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay, avait 20 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief. Elle est décédée environ 1475, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à Inverness-shire, Écosse.

de.Duart Castle, Argyll, Scotland: Duart Castle, Argyll and Bute, Schottland, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh 1445 in Inverness-shire, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan 33 und ihre Mutter Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay 20. Sie hatte mit Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb um 1475 im Alter von 31 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Inverness-shire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh è nata il nel 1445 nel Inverness-shire, Scotland, sua padre, Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay, aveva 20 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief. Morì circa 1475, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a Inverness-shire, Scotland.

ko.lifeSummary: Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh(이)가 1445년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1475년 그녀의 고향에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Marjorie Mackintosh of Mackintosh родилась в 1445 г. в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Duncan Mackintosh 11th of Mackintosh, 12th of Chattan было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Florence - Flora MacDonald of Islay, 20. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief. Она умерла около 1475 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия.

Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Hector Odhar MacLean 9th Clan  Chief. Murió aproximadamente 1475, en su pueblo, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en Inverness-shire, Scotland.
